title: premna alba
intro: Premna alba, also known as White Premna, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, native to tropical Asia. Traditionally, Premna alba has been used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Premna alba include its potential to help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. Premna alba can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and modern herbalism.
